title: thlaspi alpinum subsp. sylvium
intro: Thlaspi alpinum subsp. sylvium, also known as mountain pennycress or alpine pennycress, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of glucosinolates, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Traditional herbal preparations include making infusions, decoctions, or tinctures from the plant's leaves, stems, and roots, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
